questionHtml: Interpret the meaning of your answer to part (b) in the given context.
markschemeHtml:
3 valid descriptors, in any order:          A2

  • at 3 minutes (or when t=3)
  • cooling/decreasing (do not accept “changing”)
  • 4.72 °C min-1 (must include units) (accept approximately 5 deg/min)

 

[2 marks]
